name: GigaDevice Semiconductor (Beijing) Inc.
summary: GigaDevice Semiconductor (Beijing) Inc., a fabless company, provides memory technology and IC solutions. It provides serial peripheral interface (SPI) NOR flash, SPI NAND flash, parallel NAND flash, known good die, and cross-reference memory products, as well as microcontrollers for use in automotive/industrial, computing, consumer, Internet of Things, network/telecom, and mobile communication applications. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
